headline: A Look At Global Payments (GPN) Valuation After Mixed Share Price Performance
summary: What recent returns say about Global Payments Global Payments (GPN) has drawn attention after a mixed run in the stock, with a 3.7% move over the past day and a 4.4% gain over the past week, contrasting with weaker month and past 3 months returns. For investors, that split performance, together with a recent last close of US$71.06 and a market cap around US$18.9b, sets the stage for a closer look at how the business fundamentals line up with current pricing. See our latest analysis for Global...

headline: Global Payments Down Over 28% in a Year: How to Play the Stock?
summary: GPN stock has plunged 28% in a year as deal risks, fintech pressures and competition weigh; can execution and partnerships spark a turnaround?

headline: Shift Connect Ltd. Acquires Olympia Currency and Global Payments, Elevating International Banking Solutions for Clients Across Canada
summary: Shift Connect Ltd., a leading Canadian provider of foreign exchange and global payment services, is pleased to announce its acquisition of Olympia Currency and Global Payments, an established Alberta-based firm recognized for its personalized approach to international banking and cross-border currency solutions.

headline: Olympia to divest payment unit to Shift Connect
summary: Olympia will sell OCGPI, which offers customised currency exchange and cross-border payment services.
